sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: game-results finalization/results funnel telemetry (results-resolver.ts skip-reason attribution + [results-telemetry] funnel log) + test + package.json registration. Diagnostic-only, no behavior change. Merge SHA binds at lane close.

pnpm_verify.note: env:check, lint, type-check (project references), build, and the full unit suite all green — '[verify:parallel] all checks passed'. (Two earlier runs flaked on a transient live-Supabase degradation unrelated to this change — confirmed by a clean standalone 'pnpm test' with 0 failures.)

cases: a completed event inserts results and counts as completed (insert behavior unchanged)
a finished event still in_progress is attributed to skippedEventNotCompleted (the status-transition-gap residual)
an unmapped providerEventId is attributed to skippedEventNotFound (external_id mapping miss)
the [results-telemetry] funnel line is emitted with the full breakdown (finalized_results_in / completed / inserted / skipped_event_not_found / skipped_event_not_completed)

live_db_smoke.note: Executed pnpm test:db against live Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm — 7/7 pass. This change is diagnostic-only (adds counters + one log line); it writes no schema and changes no DB behavior.

runtime_proof.command: focused reproduction tests (post-deploy prod-log observation pending merge + deploy)
runtime_proof.note: Telemetry is observation-only; correctness is proven by the 4 focused tests asserting reason attribution and the funnel line. Post-deploy, the [results-telemetry] line appears once per finalized-repoll results pass; reading those lines across a full slate pins the residual (SGO-not-finalized vs status-transition gap vs mapping miss).

queries.description: Live reconciliation that motivated this lane (read-only, Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm): game_results unfroze after the watchdog deploy
queries.sql: SELECT max(created_at), count(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= now()-interval '24 hours') FROM game_results
queries.result_summary: max(created_at)=2026-06-22 03:17Z, 1157 rows in last 24h (total 97606 -> 98763) — pipeline flowing again post watchdog deploy

queries.description: Residual this telemetry targets (read-only): finished MLB games not transitioning to completed
queries.sql: SELECT status, count(*) FROM events WHERE sport_id='MLB' AND event_date IN ('2026-06-20','2026-06-21') GROUP BY status
queries.result_summary: completed=3, in_progress=12 (stuck — finished but never finalized -> no results), scheduled=14

queries.description: End-to-end path confirmed working for events that DO finalize (read-only)
queries.sql: SELECT external_id, status, (SELECT count(*) FROM game_results g WHERE g.event_id=e.id) FROM events e WHERE e.external_id IN ('8ERUTuxG0FX6d5KdMNk8','nhsG0vE8sQdRTzYSpII5','CSatDiAHFTis8FhFHnYl')
queries.result_summary: 3 completed events each have fresh game_results (120 / 501 / 536 rows, created 2026-06-22 03:11-03:17Z)

live_production_proof.observed: game_results flowing again post watchdog deploy (1157 rows/24h, 3 events completed end-to-end). A residual of ~12 finished MLB games remains stuck in_progress with no results; cause not yet isolated.
live_production_proof.deferred: Post-deploy: read the [results-telemetry] funnel lines across a full slate to pin the residual to SGO-not-finalized (candidates N >> finalized_results_in M) vs status-transition gap (skipped_event_not_completed) vs mapping miss (skipped_event_not_found).
live_production_proof.production_mutation: none — adds counters + one info log line; no schema, no new writes, no backfill, no fabricated picks
